query:
-- Find the customer
SELECT externalId, name, billingPlatform, monthlyRevenue, monthlySpend
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Emergency%' OR name LIKE '%Medicine%';

-- Find their services
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.status, s.customerExternalId
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Emergency%' OR c.name LIKE '%Medicine%';

-- Find their billing items
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.unitAmount, bi.quantity, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Emergency%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Medicine%';
